description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with two main rectangular volumes separated by a central vertical gap. The structure is surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The roof is flat and extends over both main sections, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. Large windows and sliding doors are visible on the ground floor, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor connectivity. The entryway is centrally located, recessed, and flanked by greenery, with a paved path leading up to it. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with two main rectangular sections, large windows, and landscaped greenery, enclosed by a low fence. The design emphasizes clean lines, natural light, and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two main volumes, flat roofs, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central entryway, symmetrical facade, and large windows flanked by trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible fencing, greenery, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the paved path leading to the central entryway and the separation between the two main volumes.
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entryway with a paved path, flanked by greenery, minimal overhang, and large glass doors.
